revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude> [[sn:Commons]] <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = commons | text = Wikimedia Commons has {{{alt-term|media related to}}} <!-- -->{{#invoke:Commons link|getGalleryOrCategory|{{{1|}}}|linktext={{{2|}}}|qid={{{qid|}}}|tracking=1|bold=1|italic=1}}.}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc sub-page and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude> [[sn:Commons]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Sister project | position = {{{position|}}} | project = commons | text = Wikimedia Commons has {{{alt-term|media related to}}} <!-- -->{{#invoke:Commons link|getGalleryOrCategory|{{{1|}}}|linktext={{{2|}}}|qid={{{qid|}}}|tracking=1|bold=1|italic=1}}.}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc sub-page and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
